cases.name: Randy Cox
cases.summary: Left paralyzed from the chest down after officers transported him handcuffed and unbelted in a police van that braked sharply; officers allegedly mocked his pleas for medical help.

cases.name: Konoa Wilson
cases.summary: A 16-year-old fleeing gunfire fired by someone else was shot twice in the back by an officer who gave no warning before firing.

cases.name: George Floyd
cases.summary: Died after an officer knelt on his neck for over nine minutes during an arrest over a suspected counterfeit bill, sparking nationwide protests.

cases.name: Francisco Benitez
cases.summary: Spent 34 years in prison for a double murder he did not commit after evidence was allegedly fabricated by Chicago police.

cases.name: Elijah McClain
cases.summary: An unarmed massage therapist walking home was placed in a carotid hold by officers, then injected with ketamine by paramedics; he died days later. He was not suspected of any crime.

cases.name: Breonna Taylor
cases.summary: Shot multiple times in her own apartment when officers executed a no-knock warrant during a botched drug raid.

cases.name: Jack Murray
cases.summary: Fatally shot by officers who responded to his own 911 call during a mental health crisis. Believed to be the largest reported settlement for a non-bystander police shooting in Illinois history.

cases.name: Carl Reed
cases.summary: Spent 19 years in prison for a murder he did not commit, tied to a detective later found to have fabricated reports and physically abused suspects.

cases.name: K'Aun Green
cases.summary: A college football player was shot by a San Jose police officer.

cases.name: Eric Blackmon
cases.summary: Spent 16 years in prison after being wrongfully convicted of a 2002 murder.

cases.name: Tamir Rice
cases.summary: A 12-year-old playing with a toy gun in a park was shot by an officer within two seconds of the patrol car arriving.

cases.name: Freddie Gray
cases.summary: Suffered a fatal spinal injury while shackled and unrestrained in the back of a police transport van.

cases.name: Eric Garner
cases.summary: Died after an officer placed him in a chokehold while arresting him on suspicion of selling untaxed cigarettes.

cases.name: Laquan McDonald
cases.summary: A 17-year-old was shot 16 times by an officer; the city settled with his family before dashcam footage of the shooting was made public.
